अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 2 अग᭭त, 2017 सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. 987 987 987 987(अ) (अ) (अ) (अ)....— — — —के᭠ ᮤीय सरकार, पᱶशन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास ᮧािधकरण अ िधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 23) कᳱ धारा 5 कᳱ उप-धारा (3) के साथ पᳯठत धारा 51 कᳱ उप-धारा (2) के खंड (क) ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, एतn~᳇ारा, पᱶशन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास ᮧािधकरण (अ᭟यᭃ तथा पूणᭅकािलक सद᭭यᲂ को देय वेतन एवं भᱫे और सेवा कᳱ अ᭠य िनबंधन एवं शतᱸ) ि नयमावली, 2014 मᱶ संशोधन करने के िलए िन᳜िलिखत िनयम बनाती है, नामत::— I (1) इन िनयमᲂ को पᱶशन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास ᮧािधकरण (अ᭟यᭃ तथा पूणᭅकािलक सद᭭यᲂ को देय वेतन एवं भᱫे और सेवा कᳱ अ᭠य िनबंधन एवं शतᱸ) िनयमावली, 2017 कहा जाएगा। (2) ये िनयम राजपᮢ मᱶ ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख से ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे। II. पᱶशन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास ᮧािधकरण (अ᭟यᭃ तथा पूणᭅकािलक सद᭭यᲂ को देय वेतन एवं भᱫे और सेवा कᳱ अ᭠य िनबंधन एवं शतᱸ) िनयमावली, 2014 मᱶ िनयम 3 के उप-िनयम (1) मᱶ िन᳜िलिखत उप-िनयम को ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकया जाएगा, नामत::— “(1) पᱶशन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास ᮧािधकरण के अ᭟यᭃ और इसके ᮧ᭜येक पूणᭅकािलक सद᭭य कᳱ िनयुिᲦ के᭠ᮤ सरकार ᳇ारा चयन सिमित कᳱ अनुशंसा पर कᳱ जाएगी िजसम ᱶ िन᳜िलिखत शािमल हᲂगे, नामत::— -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (क) मंिᮢम᭛डल सिचव —अ᭟यᭃ (ख) ᮧधान मंᮢी के अपर ᮧधान सिचव —सद᭭य (ग) सिचव, िवᱫ मंᮢालय, िवᱫीय सेवाएं िवभाग —सद᭭य (घ) अ᭟यᭃ, पᱶशन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास ᮧािधकरण —सद᭭ य (पूणᭅकािलक सद᭭य के चयन के िलए) (ड.) तीन ᭎याितᮧा᳙ बा᳭ िवशेष᭄ (के᭠ᮤ सरकार ᳇ारा िवᱫ, अथᭅशाᳫ, िविध, लोक ᮧशासन, िवᱫीय बाजार के ᭃेᮢᲂ तथा इसके ᳇ारा अनुरिᭃत िवषयᲂ के िवशेष᭄ᲂ के पैनल से नािमत ᳰकया जाना है) —सद᭭य” [फा. सं. 11/5/2014–पीआर] सुची᭠ᮤ िम᮰, संयुᲦ सिचव ᳯट᭡पणी ᳯट᭡पणी ᳯट᭡पणी ᳯट᭡पणी: मूल िनयम भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण मᱶ 20 अग᭭त, 2014 के सा.का.िन. 597(अ) के ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत ᳰकए गए थे। MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Financial Services) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd August, 2017 G.S.R. 987(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (2) of section 51, read with sub-section (3) of section 5 of the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 2013 (23 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Salary and Allowances Payable to, and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of, Chairperson and Whole-time Members) Rules, 2014, namely:— I. (1) These rules may be called the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Salary and Allowances Payable to, and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of, Chairperson and Whole-time Members) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. II. In the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Salary and Allowances Payable to, and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of, Chairperson and Whole-time Members) Rules, 2014, in rule 3, for sub-rule (1), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:— “(1) The Chairperson of the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority and every whole- time member thereof shall be appointed by the Central Government on the recommendation of a Selection Committee consisting of the following, namely:— (a) Cabinet Secretary —Chairman; (b) Additional Principal Secretary to the Prime Minister —Member; (c) Secretary, Ministry of Finance, Department of Financial Services —Member; (d) Chairperson, Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority —Member: (for selection of whole-time Member) -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 (e) Three outside experts of repute (to be nominated by the Central Government from a panel of experts in the fields of Finance, Economics, Law, Public Administration, Financial Markets and related subjects to be maintained by it) —Member”. [F. No. 11/5/2014-PR] SUCHINDRA MISRA, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide notification number G.S.R. 597(E), dated 20th August, 2014. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
